title: Memory with LangGraph
tagline: Give your agent short-term thread memory and long-term user context with LangGraph.

story.problem: The LangGraph agent can orchestrate a request, but it still forgets conversation threads and user context unless memory is modeled explicitly.
story.solution: Use LangGraph checkpointers for short-term thread memory and LangGraph stores for long-term user or application memory, then recall bounded context before the Nebius model writes.
story.outcome: A stateful agent that can continue a thread and personalize across sessions without pushing memory management into the FastAPI route.

endpoints.description: Run the agent with thread and long-term memory recall, then stream SSE events back.
List the long-term memories stored for a user.
Delete the long-term memories stored for a user.
Delete short-term checkpoints for a conversation thread.
